title: CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Associate Posts
description: The CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Senior Project Associate I post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech can apply for the CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age lim...
